coreImage: 前半句前进时遇到一堵转折小墙
fable: 有台机器人厨师以为自己能复制所有美食，蛋糕、分子料理都成功了。but，它遇到一碗奶奶的手擀面后突然关机。那碗面像一堵小墙，挡住了它的自信，也推出了另一面：技术强，但温度难复制。
moral: but 用来转向相反的一面，或指出例外和限制。
memoryHook: but 像一堵小墙：前半句往前冲，撞到 but 后，意思转向另一边。这是视觉记忆钩子。
anchorSentence: I wanted to skip the meeting, but it turned out to be the most useful one all week.
collocations: have no choice but to do something
activeChunks: have no choice but to restart
sentencePatterns: I had no choice but to ...
personalExample: I wanted to finish quickly, but I had to slow down and make the sentence sound natural.
notes: but most often introduces contrast. In fixed chunks, use have no choice but to + verb and can't help but + bare verb. Do not say can't help but to do something. nothing but means only; everyone but X means everyone except X.
recallQuestions: 机器人遇到手擀面后意思突然转向，这堵转折小墙对应哪个词？
nothing but excuses 是什么意思？
用 have no choice but to 写一句和工作有关的英文句子。
